title: ProjectGator
description: ProjectGator is a mod based on Alligators, Crocodiles, Caimans and Gharials
body:
ProjectGator is a mod based on Alligators, Crocodiles, Caimans and Gharials. You can kill an alligator and get Reptile Leather from him and create strong armor. You can combine this mod with other mods with animals and create a perfect ZOO.

**For this mod to work you need [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)**

 

ANIMALS:

- American Alligator                                                           

- Saltwater Crocodile

- Black Caiman

- Nile Crocodile

- Indian Gharial

- Albino American Alligator

- Albino Saltwater Crocodile

- Cuban Crocodile

- Chinese Alligator

- Orinoco Crocodile

- Mugger Crocodile
